subcodes.first_line: O Taqi! Thou hast indeed interpreted what thou didst interpret concerning thy standing before the Gate and thy presence in the seats [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا تقی قد فسرت ما فسرت فیما اردت فی قیامک لدی الباب و حضورک فی مقاعد
subcodes.subjects: @intuition; inspiration, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @mystical themes, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @love of God
